name: Copy of BLACK SWAN CATCHER + BIL CANARY + EQUITY (BACKTESTS TO 5/14/2013) 37246.1% CUMULATIVE/82.8% ANNUAL/21.8% DRAWDOWN
description: This symphony is designed to capture the returns of my favorite ETFs while minimizing Drawdowns with multiple protective measures in the form of a Black Swan Catcher designed by Garen and using BIL as a canary asset a defensive design by Perfekt. When on the offensive it buys 4 of my favorite ETFs encompassing some growth but mostly value stocks at varying caps.
